Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}While exploring Tartarus, you can save at {f 0 1 2}locations where you can change your party{f 0 1 27}. However, you cannot save on the floor you're currently exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can save from the menu or by pressing {f 1 3 108}.[n]{f 1 1}
